chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4757 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 20-02-2025 Mr. Altamash Arab Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Petition has been filed by three government officials seeking government accommodation. No vested and/or constitutional right to seek the same has been demonstrated. Petition is found to be misconceived and dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
